en_title: Ubisoft Closing 2 More Studios Amid Further Cuts and Job Losses
cn_title: 育碧再关两间工作室，裁员波及380人
subtitle: 雪上加霜
opus_summary: 育碧因持续削减成本，将关闭加拿大温尼伯和塞尔维亚贝尔格莱德的两间工作室。全球发行部门及巴塞罗那工作室也将调整，后者将专注《彩虹六号》系列。本轮裁员预计影响多达380个职位。

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft will shut a further two studios as a result of continued cost cutting measures, IGN understands.
paragraphs.cn: 据IGN了解，育碧因持续削减成本，将再关闭两间工作室。

paragraphs.en: Development offices located in the Canadian city of Winnipeg and the Serbian capital of Belgrade are the latest to be marked for closure.
paragraphs.cn: 位于加拿大温尼伯和塞尔维亚首都贝尔格莱德的两间开发办公室是最新被标记为关闭的地点。

paragraphs.en: Further job losses are expected due to organizational changes within the company's global publishing division, and in Ubisoft's studio based in Barcelona, Spain. The latter will now focus solely on the Rainbow Six franchise, having previously supported other projects such as the Rabbids series and Star Trek: Bridge Crew.
paragraphs.cn: 由于公司全球发行部门以及位于西班牙巴塞罗那的工作室进行组织调整，预计还会有更多裁员。巴塞罗那工作室此前曾支持《疯狂兔子》系列和《星际迷航：舰桥船员》等项目，今后将只专注于《彩虹六号》系列。

paragraphs.en: In total, the latest cuts are expected to impact up to 380 positions, further downsizing Ubisoft's global headcount after repeated job losses over recent years, as profits have fallen and the company's blockbuster game output has slowed.
paragraphs.cn: 总体而言，最新一轮裁员预计将影响多达380个职位，进一步缩减育碧的全球员工规模。近年来，由于利润下滑且公司大作产出放缓，育碧已多次裁员。

paragraphs.en: Back in 2023, Ubisoft employed more than 20,000 staff. As of this year — and before today's latest changes — the firm reported that figure was down to 16,590.
paragraphs.cn: 2023年时，育碧员工总数超过2万人。截至今年——在今天最新变动之前——该公司报告该数字已降至16,590人。

paragraphs.en: In March, Ubisoft confirmed that 105 staff were set to depart veteran Tom Clancy game studio Red Storm Entertainment , as part of a move that downsized the studio permanently, following three previous waves of layoffs at the company since 2022.
paragraphs.cn: 今年3月，育碧确认老牌汤姆·克兰西游戏工作室Red Storm Entertainment将有105名员工离职，这是该工作室永久性缩编的一部分。此前自2022年以来，育碧已进行过三轮裁员。

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft has cut hundreds of staff and fully closed numerous studios in recent times, with 2026 already off to a brutal start. In January, the company canceled six games including its Prince of Persia: Sands of Time remake and closed two Ubisoft studios completely (Ubisoft Stockholm and Ubisoft Halifax), while making layoffs at its office in Abu Dhabi, at Trials studio RedLynx and at Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora outfit Massive Entertainment.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧近期已裁减数百名员工，并完全关闭了多家工作室，2026年开局便十分惨烈。今年1月，该公司取消了六款游戏，包括《波斯王子：时之砂》重制版，并彻底关闭了育碧斯德哥尔摩和育碧哈利法克斯两间工作室，同时在其阿布扎比办公室、《特技摩托》工作室RedLynx以及《阿凡达：潘多拉边境》开发商Massive Entertainment进行了裁员。

paragraphs.en: Just a week after that, Ubisoft announced plans to ditch 200 jobs at its company headquarters in Paris , leading to protests within the French capital. Next, in February, Ubisoft was forced to reassure fans that its long-awaited Splinter Cell remake remained in development after 40 jobs were eliminated at its studio Ubisoft Toronto .
paragraphs.cn: 仅一周后，育碧宣布计划在其巴黎总部裁减200个职位，引发法国首都的抗议活动。接着在2月，育碧多伦多工作室裁减40个职位后，育碧被迫向粉丝保证，备受期待的《细胞分裂》重制版仍在开发中。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
